# Hamees Momin

> Full-stack developer portfolio for Hamees Momin, focused on secure, high-performance websites, AI cybersecurity tooling, real estate platforms, wealth interfaces, and polished digital products.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://hameesmomin.com/): Overview of Hamees Momin, full-stack development services, featured projects, capabilities, and contact options.
- [Selected Work](https://hameesmomin.com/#work): Featured projects including Skywing Real Estate, Purewealth, and Varaa Realty.
- [Private Product Demos](https://hameesmomin.com/#products): Gated access overview for Aura Command, Documind, Siteflow, and SecureOps.
- [Capabilities](https://hameesmomin.com/#about): Frontend engineering, backend engineering, and product delivery capabilities.
- [Contact](https://hameesmomin.com/#contact): Secure inquiry form, email contact, and WhatsApp contact for project requests.

## Featured Projects

- [Skywing Real Estate](https://skywingrealty.com/): Real estate website focused on property discovery, performance, and lead generation.
- [Purewealth](https://purewealth.me/): Wealth-oriented digital platform focused on clarity, trust, and user experience.
- [Varaa Realty](https://varaarealty.com/): Real estate brand website with structured services and conversion-ready contact flows.
- Aura Command: WhatsApp operations platform positioned around never losing a lead.
- Documind: Document intelligence platform positioned around avoiding costly document expiries.
- Siteflow: Construction operations platform positioned around turning daily site updates into signed reports.
- SecureOps: Cybersecurity operations platform positioned around seeing business security risks before attackers or auditors do.
